_comment: Repulyser signal type enum. Index values must match IReputationRegistry.SignalType. The 'description' field explains what the raw 0..10000 score represents; the 'attestorHint' is what an off-chain attestor should measure.

0.name: AccountAge
0.description: Wallet age in days since first transaction. 0 = brand new, 10000 = 4+ years active.
0.attestorHint: Compute age = now - first_tx_timestamp. Normalize: score = min(age_days / 1460, 1) * 10000. Cap at 10000.

1.name: TxVolume
1.description: Lifetime native token (PHRS / PROS) volume in/out. 0 = zero volume, 10000 = whale tier (>= 1,000,000 tokens).
1.attestorHint: Sum value of all native transfers to/from the address (in+out). score = min(volume / 1_000_000e18, 1) * 10000.

2.name: TxFrequency
2.description: Transaction count in the last 30 days. 0 = dormant, 10000 = 500+ txs in 30 days.
2.attestorHint: count txs in last 30d. score = min(count / 500, 1) * 10000.

3.name: DefiInteractions
3.description: Distinct DeFi protocol contracts interacted with. 0 = none, 10000 = 25+ protocols.
3.attestorHint: unique counterparties from a curated DeFi address set. score = min(distinct / 25, 1) * 10000.

4.name: GovernanceVotes
4.description: Onchain DAO votes cast. 0 = never voted, 10000 = 50+ votes.

5.name: NftHoldings
5.description: Number of NFTs currently held. 0 = none, 10000 = 100+ NFTs.
5.attestorHint: count ERC721 + ERC1155 holdings. score = min(count / 100, 1) * 10000.

6.name: SocialEndorsements
6.description: Peer endorsements received from other registered subjects. 0 = none, 10000 = 20+.
6.attestorHint: count signals of type SocialEndorsements on this subject from other registered subjects. score = min(count / 20, 1) * 10000.

7.name: ContractDeploys
7.description: Number of contracts deployed by the address. 0 = none, 10000 = 25+ deployments.
7.attestorHint: count transactions where to == null. score = min(count / 25, 1) * 10000.

8.name: AssetDiversity
8.description: Distinct ERC20 tokens held (non-zero balance). 0 = none, 10000 = 50+ distinct tokens.
8.attestorHint: scan a token list, count where balanceOf(subject) > 0. score = min(distinct / 50, 1) * 10000.

9.name: LiquidStaking
9.description: Active liquid staking positions. 0 = none, 10000 = 5+ positions OR a very large single one.
9.attestorHint: count distinct liquid staking receipt tokens held. score = min(positions / 5, 1) * 10000.
